context: Tests whether the agent correctly processes skill review output into prioritized, well-formatted recommendations following the skill-optimizer workflow. Covers priority ordering (Critical first), the required per-recommendation format, and the summary presentation format.

checklist.name: Critical issues first
checklist.description: Recommendations are ordered with Critical issues (ERRORs) presented before High, Medium, and Low priority items

checklist.name: High before Medium/Low
checklist.description: High priority items (missing 'Use when...', low actionability) appear before Medium and Low items in the document

checklist.name: Summary with priorities
checklist.description: Document includes a summary section that groups all recommendations by priority level (Critical/High/Medium/Low) before individual details

checklist.name: Expected improvement in summary
checklist.description: Summary section includes expected overall score improvement (e.g. percentage gain estimate)

checklist.name: Dimension score included
checklist.description: Each recommendation states the current score for the affected dimension (e.g. 'Completeness: 1/3')

checklist.name: Before/after examples
checklist.description: Each recommendation includes a concrete before and after example showing the proposed text change

checklist.name: Impact stated per recommendation
checklist.description: Each recommendation includes the expected score impact (e.g. '+15% overall')

checklist.name: Educational WHY included
checklist.description: Each recommendation explains WHY the change improves the skill — not just what to change, but why it helps the dimension

checklist.name: All four issues addressed
checklist.description: Recommendations cover all key issues from the review: missing Use-when clause, broken file reference, abstract instructions, and known-concepts bloat

checklist.name: Approval framing
checklist.description: Document is framed as proposed changes for review/approval — not already applied changes
